meta_description: Portfolio of Robert Schäfer, full stack developer focused on software quality, open source, and technical communication.
open_source_summary: I contribute to open source, give talks, and help others learn to code.
tech_experience_intro: Each technology combines three signals: time spent with it, how many projects it appeared in, and how recently it was part of shipped work.
talks_intro: Talks and teaching sessions are linked directly for quick access.
contact_summary: Remote-friendly full stack development, open source collaboration, and technical speaking.
print_fallback_body: For the official PDF version of this CV, use the links below.
imprint_intro: Provider information according to the usual German imprint requirements.
privacy_intro: This privacy policy covers hosting, server logs, contact options, and external links.
privacy_hosting_body: When you access this website, the hosting provider may process technical access data in server log files. This typically includes IP address, date, time, requested file, referrer, browser type, and operating system.
privacy_contact_body: If you contact me by email or Signal, the data you provide is processed to handle your request.
privacy_external_body: This website contains links to external services such as GitHub, LinkedIn, Mastodon, YouTube, media.ccc.de, or Signal. Embedded media is not loaded automatically during a normal page visit. Data may only be transferred to third parties after you activate a link or embedded media.
root_page_description: Choose German or English for Robert Schäfer's portfolio.
root_lead_de: This website is available in German and English. Without additional locale detection, German is the default version.
root_lead_en: This website is available in German and English. Without additional locale detection, German is the default version.
